steps.title: Substitute x = 5 into the second equation
steps.content:
Since the graphs intersect at $(5, y)$, we know $x = 5$ must satisfy both equations. Substituting into the second equation:
$$8(5) + 2by = 80$$
$$40 + 2by = 80$$
$$2by = 40$$
$$by = 20$$

steps.title: Use the relationship to find a
steps.content:
Now substitute $x = 5$ and $by = 20$ into the first equation:
$$a(5) + by = 70$$
$$5a + 20 = 70$$
$$5a = 50$$
$$a = 10$$
That matches Choice D — $10$.
